case_title: MIRIAM TSIGE VS. BENSON WEN BEEN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSIGE, MIRIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEEN, BENSON WEN $1,931.85 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,006.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT BEEN, BENSON WEN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TSIGE, MIRIAM

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TSIGE, MIRIAM AS TO DEFENDANT BEEN, BENSON WEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
